'''BX-00''' served as Baron [[Gavern Starlock]]'s driver, guard, aide, and [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]. It tried to run over [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in [[Baron Starlock's hovercraft]]. It later tried to assassinate [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Jagoda]] on Starlock's orders, but was stopped by C-3PO.

{{Droid-stub}}
